description: CompositionRound neck blue t-shirt with fading chest print, made of 100% cottonWash care1. Light machine wash2. Do not bleach 3. Warm iron on reverse 4. Do not dry clean 5. Dry flat/ reverse 6. Do not scrubFittingFittedCelebrate the spirit of music with this Band of Blues tee from wrangler's collection. In light blue and fading yellow print, this t-shirt is given a complete retro feel. Made of cotton fabric, it will keep you dry and comfortable through all seasons, while you can adopt a stylish look by pairing this tee with denim pants or shorts and ankle length boots from the wide range available at myntra.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6.2', Chest-39.5", Waist-32"
